name: A. MOHAMED YASAR
title: Full Stack Engineer | React.js | MERN Stack | REST APIs | JavaScript
summary: Full Stack Engineer with 2.5+ years of experience building responsive web applications using React.js and integrating REST APIs. Proven ability to debug complex UI, API, and database issues, collaborate with cross-functional teams, and deliver stable, scalable solutions. Actively expanding backend skills with Node.js, Express.js, Spring Boot, and Python — with hands-on MERN stack projects in progress.

description: Developed reusable, responsive UI components using React.js and Material UI, improving UI consistency across modules
Integrated frontend modules with backend REST APIs, handling API responses and managing complex data flows
Wrote and optimized SQL queries for data validation, issue analysis, and performance troubleshooting
Led investigation and resolution of UI, API, and database-related bugs — reducing post-release issues
Collaborated with developers and QA teams to ensure smooth application releases and post-deployment validation
Maintained clear technical documentation for features, API contracts, and issue resolutions

projects.name: Job Planner / Job Management System
description: Built modular UI components and integrated backend APIs with efficient data rendering and validation
Investigated and fixed cross-layer issues spanning UI, APIs, and SQL databases
Contributed UI/UX improvement suggestions that enhanced workflow efficiency
Supported pre-production testing and validation to ensure stable releases
